items.title: bytedance/deer-flow
items.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
items.cn_summary: 字节跳动开源长周期超级智能体框架

items.title: QVal: Cheaply Evaluating Dense Supervision Signals for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
items.description: LLM agents increasingly act over long horizons, where a single trajectory can contain hundreds or thousands of actions. In these settings, outcome-only rewards provide too sparse guidance, failing to inform the model about the goodness of intermediate actions. Dense supervision methods aim to solve this problem by scoring intermediate steps, from intrinsic confidence to self-distillation and embedding similarities. However, it is common practice to evaluate them by measuring the downstream perfo
items.cn_summary: 低成本评估长周期LLM智能体密集监督信号的方法
